info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is meant to be won.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: The goal of life is to have fun.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is meant to be fun with friends and family.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: In life, when you master one challenge, start another one.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Life is meant to be playful.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Learn how from other successful people in life and then emulate them.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: When you are behind in life, don't quit.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Take calculated risks to win in life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Don't play too safe in life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Know when to hold them and when to fold them in life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: It is okay to call a time out in life in order to regroup.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Call a time out in your life in order to regroup.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: To the victor go the spoils in life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Play by your own rules in life.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Do not play to not to lose in life.
